chat.speaker: user
chat.text: Hey, I just moved to Berlin last week.

chat.speaker: assistant
chat.text: Welcome! How are you finding it so far?

chat.speaker: user
chat.text: Pretty good. I started a new job at a fintech on Tuesday.

chat.speaker: user
chat.text: I'm a backend engineer, mostly Go and Postgres.

chat.speaker: assistant
chat.text: Cool. Anything fun planned for the weekend?

chat.speaker: user
chat.text: I think I'm going to check out the flea market at Mauerpark on Saturday.

chat.speaker: assistant
chat.text: Mauerpark on a Saturday is iconic — you'll love it.
